title: KarpInfo
description: Client-Side QoL mod for the server KobbledKarp. Offers HUDs, reminders, a stats tracker and more.
body:
# KarpInfo

Client-side quality-of-life mod specifically for the server KobbledKarp.

This mod reads information (like timers) from server chat and keeps track of them by displaying them in HUDs or by scheduling reminders. 

Timers include those for legendary spawns, Battle Tower, STS, and more. You won’t miss important information anymore, even if you don’t constantly read chat, and you no longer need to track multiple timers yourself.

For the mod to detect a timer, it must first appear in chat. So use `/legendinfo` once for the legendary timer, or for activities like the Battle Tower, complete them once to start tracking them.

Many features can be configured with `/karpinfo config`.

**Disclaimer:**
This is an unofficial mod made by me. The server admins allowed me to upload it, but they are not affiliated with it, so please contact me for support instead of the server staff.
This mod does not automate gameplay, give information that are not visible to the palyer, or send any packets to the server.

## Features

**Various HUDs** – most are only shown when needed or when the "HUD Details Key" (default: Alt) is pressed:
- `Main HUD`: Shows timers for the next legendary spawn, STS, and daycare, as well as Vote Party progress and the current time.
- `Tasks Cooldown HUD`: Shows when daily/weekly tasks like the Battle Tower, Kits, or Distortion Gyms are ready.
- `Server Timer HUD`: Shows item clear, server restart, and raid join timers.
- `Raid HUD`: Shows real-time raid rankings.
- `Legend Info HUD`: Shows current conditions for legendary spawns and conditions for the next legendary spawn.

**Notifications and Reminders** with optional sounds:
- Reminders 1 and 3 minutes before legendary spawns
- Notifications when a Vote Party is about to complete
- STS reminder (more precise than the existing one)
- Raid start notification and reminder
- Breeding notification sounds

**Stats Tracking** – displays custom KobbledKarp stats `/karpinfo stats`
- Number of legendary spawns witnessed and obtained
- Number of scam parties witnessed
- Money made and spent with `/shops`, `/pay`, `/sts`
- Money made with chest shops and `/gts` while online (can’t track while offline)
- Total GTS tax paid
- Number of raids participated in, times placed in the top 3, and average position
- Vote/Raid crates opened and Leg/Tex keys won
- Eggs bred and hatched
- Pokemon caught

And detailed breakdowns:
- Chest Shop tracking for all transaction types and what products made/cost how much
- Balance tracking when doing `\balance`, graph that shows your balance over time

**Legendary spawn helper**
Commands that tell you which Legendary Pokémon can spawn for you:
- `/checklegend now` tells you all legendaries that could spawn for you right now
- `/checklegend next` same, but uses the time of the next legendary spawn instead
- `/checklegendfilter` allows you to check for other times, biomes, and weather

**Dex helper** helps with completing the Pokedex
- Notifications when a wild pokemon that is not in your Pokedex is nearby.
- Also makes pokemon not in your dex glow (no esp they only glow when you can see them)
- A custom Pokedex UI `\dexhelper` where you can filter by uncaught pokemon
  - Clicking on a pokemon wil open its Bulbapedia page.
  - You can copy a list of your missing pokemon to share with others for touch trades

**Card Collection Tracking**
needs you to open each card page once for it to know what cards you already have
- Adds a green marker to collected cards and a red marker to cards you are still missing
- In the binder pages shows card school icon and a "+" icon tho cards that can be added
- Command `/karpinfo missingcards` copies all cards you are missing to sahre for trading

**Local friends tracking**
Allows you to add friends with `/friend add <name>`, which provides some useful features:
- When joining the server, a list of all online friends will be displayed
- `/friend online` shows which friends are online and their AFK status
- `/friend list` shows all your friends and when you last saw them online
- Optional notification sounds when friends join or leave
- `/friend remove <name>` removes a friend

**Lots of config options** use `/karpinfo config` or the ModMenu mod:
- Disable HUDs, notifications, or sounds
- Adjust HUD positions, backgrounds, and scale
- Disable the "Shiny Boost" Boss Bar for less HUD clutter
- Show an icon for plushies in GTS to distinguish them from Pokemon
- Hide plushies on the Minimap
- Configure when HUDs or specific entries are shown
